revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required before production: (1) Correct the schema reference at cherry_pick_moments[2] (ts 01:15) from 'coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring' to 'coaching_philosophy.objection_inversion' or 'button_up' — the bill_anchoring citation is a factual mismatch that will mislead managers. (2) Correct the schema reference at cherry_pick_moments[1] (ts 01:07) from 'coaching_philosophy.curiosity_over_features' to 'coaching_philosophy.objection_inversion' as the primary reference. (3) Reclassify cherry_pick_moments[3] (ts 01:35) from 'conditional_booking' to 'missed_conditional_booking_opportunity' or 'soft_exit' — no booking occurred and the current classification is factually wrong. (4) Add three missed cherry_pick_moments: (a) ts 00:03 — intro omits Tesla framing on a Tesla-sourced lead (schema: intros.tesla); (b) ts 00:29 — rep describes role as 'design team' creating scope/expectation blur (schema: setter_scope_discipline); (c) ts 00:51 — rep proactively pulled satellite imagery, a positive trust signal that should be credited in a balanced brief (schema: analysis_directives.trust_building_micro_trades). Additionally, soften the 'no qualification data' claim in trajectory_verdict.summary to 'minimal qualification data' — address and interest were confirmed. The satellite-imagery context should also be reflected in the rep_intent framing to avoid overstating passivity.
